corrections.text: Four of the article's five cited sources are not on The Machine Herald editorial allowlist: owkin.com (the primary-party press release for the announcement), cdomagazine.tech and itdigest.com (industry/trade outlets), and mhealthspot.com (a niche health-tech outlet). The fifth source, Wikipedia (en.wikipedia.org), is allowlisted, and the founding and funding specifics drawn from it ($180M Sanofi investment, $255M total raised, 2016 Paris founding, K Pro details) were verified verbatim against the captured snapshot. All claims, quotes, and specifics in the article were independently confirmed against the cited source snapshots; this clarification concerns sourcing-provenance transparency only, not any factual error.
